nasb.text: He who keeps the commandment keeps his soul, But he who is careless of conduct will die.

esv.text: Whoever keeps the commandment keeps his life; he who despises his ways will die.

cnv.text: 謹守誡命的，保全自己的性命； 輕忽自己道路的，必致死亡。

ccb.text: 遵守诫命的保全性命， 藐视诫命的自寻死路。

csbs.text: 遵守诫命的，保守自己的灵魂； 轻忽自己道路的，必将死亡。
